---
title: "OptimizeResult"
generated: true
description: "Result of a nonlinear-least-squares solve."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.linalg.optimize`](../nitrix-linalg-optimize.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:OptimizeResult -->
```python
class OptimizeResult(NamedTuple)
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:OptimizeResult -->
Result of a nonlinear-least-squares solve.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
